details.reasoning: Excellent implementation meeting all rubric requirements. The stepper component is properly marked with 'use client' and exports all required sub-components (Stepper, StepperItem, StepperTrigger, StepperTitle, StepperDescription, StepperSeparator, StepperContent) plus useful additions (StepperList, useStepper). All sub-components correctly use data-slot attributes and cn() for class merging. React context (StepperContext/StepperItemContext with useContext/createContext hooks) properly manages shared state. Both horizontal and vertical orientations are fully supported with data-orientation attributes and conditional styling. The demo file correctly uses the stepper components with useState-style state management via useStepper hook. Registry entries for both 'stepper' UI component and 'stepper-demo' example are properly added to their respective _registry.ts files. No existing component files were modified. Minor deduction only for the empty PLAN.md file created in the root, which is not part of the actual component requirements but appears in the diff.
